name: Apple Candy (Copy-cat Applets)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and pare the apples; cut into small pieces.
2. Add 1/4 cup of the water to a saucepan and cook until tender.
3. Pour the apples through a food mill or sieve, reserving the liquid.
4. Add the sugar to the reserved apple liquid. Cook over low heat until thick (about 1/2 hour), stirring often.
5. Soften the gelatin in the remaining 1/4 cup cold water; stir into the hot mixture until dissolved.
6. Chill the mixture until slightly thickened, then stir in the walnuts and lemon juice.
7. Pour the mixture into a square pan to a depth of about 1/2 inch.
8. Chill thoroughly.
9. Cut into squares.
10. Combine confectioner's sugar and cornstarch; roll the squares in this mixture.
